Now I have a good set of words from the allowlist. Let me draft my entry:

A contraction is a way to make two words into one shorter word. For example, "do not" becomes "don't" and "cannot" becomes "can't." A contraction uses an apostrophe to show where letters are missing. This way of speaking is faster and easier for everyday talk. A contraction is not an expansion.
